summary: Terrible soundboard recording that fails to capture an otherwise solid 1988 show.
review: Both reviewers slam the audio quality, calling it the worst‑sounding SBD they’ve heard and urging listeners to skip it in favor of other sources. While they acknowledge the concert itself is a decent, underrated 1988 performance, the recording’s flaws make it essentially unlistenable.

ai_rating.rationale: The show is regarded as solid (roughly a 4/5), but the recording is judged abysmal (1/5). Weighted average (70% show, 30% recording) yields about 3.1 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the 'lousiest sounding SBD ever' and far inferior to any audience recordings of the same show; muffled, lacking clarity, does not do the performance justice.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers call the concert a solid, underrated 1988 show but give no specifics on song flow or pacing.
